title: EIGRP ACL Düzeltme (R10, ACL 150) + CoPP: ICMP 8000 bps (R20)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: EIGRP is preconfigured on all routers. Configure R10 and R20 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Modify the existing ACL on R10 so that EIGRP routes are received from R20 and R30. (1) The modification should only allow EIGRP routes to pass. (2) Do not remove any configuration from R10 to achieve this task.
Task 2: Configure CoPP on R20 to achieve these results: (1) Permit ICMP traffic from 192.168.24.0/24. (2) Limit traffic to 8,000 bps. (3) Discard additional packets.
hints: R10'da 'show access-lists' ile ACL numarasını doğrula (150 bekleniyor).
ICMP için protokol icmp: 'permit icmp 192.168.24.0 0.0.0.255 any' (tcp/eq yok!).
8,000 bps limit + fazlasını at: 'police 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop'.
answer_key_raw:
R10:
R10> enable
R10# configure terminal
R10(config)# ip access-list extended 150
R10(config-ext-nacl)# 5 permit eigrp any any
R10(config-ext-nacl)# end
R10# write

R20:
R20> enable
R20# configure terminal
R20(config)# ip access-list extended ICMP
R20(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp 192.168.24.0 0.0.0.255 any
R20(config-ext-nacl)# exit
R20(config)# class-map match-any ICMP
R20(config-cmap)# match access-group name ICMP
R20(config-cmap)# exit
R20(config)# policy-map COPP
R20(config-pmap)# class ICMP
R20(config-pmap-c)# police 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
R20(config-pmap-c)# control-plane
R20(config-cp)# service-policy input COPP
R20(config-cp)# end
R20# write
explanation: Aynı CoPP ailesinin ICMP varyantı: R10'daki ACL 150'ye '5 permit eigrp any any'; R20'de ICMP trafiğini (192.168.24.0/24 kaynaklı) tanımlayan ACL, class-map, 8000 bps police ve control-plane service-policy input.
